name: SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM)
description: Enterprise warehouse execution for high-volume DCs — tasking, inventory, and outbound orchestration often used as the system of record for robot work allocation.
pricingHint: Enterprise license + implementation; typically a major IT program, not a line-item SaaS add-on.

name: Generic / mid-market WMS
description: Representative mid-market warehouse management systems that expose order, inventory, and task APIs or file-based connectors for AMR/AGV fleets.
pricingHint: Mid-range SaaS or perpetual licenses; connector and professional services often quoted separately.

name: Facilities / cleaning ops platform
description: Building and janitorial operations tools used to schedule coverage, track completeness, and hand off exceptions between autonomous cleaners and on-site staff.
pricingHint: Often bundled with robot RaaS or sold as light SaaS; pricing varies by site count.
